title: Waggle-Resonance Apiary: Maximizing Distinct Dance Channels
strategies: arithmetic-progression apiary baseline: boxes at 0,1,...,n-1, sumset = {0..2n-2}, |A+A| = 2n-1 (Ratio 0.1)
Mian-Chowla sum-greedy (B_2^+ packing): repeatedly add the smallest post keeping every pairwise sum distinct, then fill leftovers with smallest unused posts
seeded random-restart hill climbing: start from the greedy set (and random sets), relocate one box at a time, accepting relocations that do not shrink the distinct-sum count |A+A|
algebraic Sidon/B_2 constructions (Singer / quadratic-residue difference sets, Erdos-Turan a=i^2 mod p) rescaled into the tight rail, or simulated annealing over the post set
